methods.void close(): Closes the Cursor, releasing all of its resources and making it completely invalid.
methods.void copyStringToBuffer(int columnIndex,: Retrieves the requested column text and stores it in the buffer provided.
methods.void deactivate(): This method was deprecated in API level 16. Since requery() is deprecated, so too is this.
methods.byte[] getBlob(int columnIndex): Returns the value of the requested column as a byte array.
methods.int getColumnIndex(String columnName): Returns the zero-based index for the given column name, or -1 if the column doesn't exist.
methods.int getColumnIndexOrThrow(String columnN: Returns the zero-based index for the given column name, or throws IllegalArgumentException if the column doesn't exist.
methods.String getColumnName(int columnIndex): Returns the column name at the given zero-based column index.
methods.String[] getColumnNames(): Returns a string array holding the names of all of the columns in the result set in the order in which they were listed in the result.
methods.int getCount(): Returns the numbers of rows in the cursor.
methods.double getDouble(int columnIndex): Returns the value of the requested column as a double.
methods.Bundle getExtras(): Returns a bundle of extra values.
methods.float getFloat(int columnIndex): Returns the value of the requested column as a float.
methods.int getInt(int columnIndex): Returns the value of the requested column as an int.
methods.long getLong(int columnIndex): Returns the value of the requested column as a long.
methods.Uri getNotificationUri(): Return the URI at which notifications of changes in this Cursor's data will be delivered, as previously set by setNotificationUri(ContentResolver, Uri).
methods.List getNotificationUris(): Return the URIs at which notifications of changes in this Cursor's data will be delivered, as previously set by setNotificationUris(ContentResolver, List).
methods.int getPosition(): Returns the current position of the cursor in the row set.
methods.short getShort(int columnIndex): Returns the value of the requested column as a short.
methods.String getString(int columnIndex): Returns the value of the requested column as a String.
methods.int getType(int columnIndex): Returns data type of the given column's value.
methods.boolean getWantsAllOnMoveCalls(): onMove() will only be called across processes if this method returns true.
methods.boolean isAfterLast(): Returns whether the cursor is pointing to the position after the last row.
methods.boolean isBeforeFirst(): Returns whether the cursor is pointing to the position before the first row.
methods.boolean isClosed(): return true if the cursor is closed
methods.boolean isFirst(): Returns whether the cursor is pointing to the first row.
methods.boolean isLast(): Returns whether the cursor is pointing to the last row.
methods.boolean isNull(int columnIndex): Returns true if the value in the indicated column is null.
methods.boolean move(int offset): Move the cursor by a relative amount, forward or backward, from the current position.
methods.boolean moveToFirst(): Move the cursor to the first row.
methods.boolean moveToLast(): Move the cursor to the last row.
methods.boolean moveToNext(): Move the cursor to the next row.
methods.boolean moveToPosition(int position): Move the cursor to an absolute position.
methods.boolean moveToPrevious(): Move the cursor to the previous row.
methods.void registerContentObserver(ContentObse: Register an observer that is called when changes happen to the content backing this cursor.
methods.void registerDataSetObserver(DataSetObse: Register an observer that is called when changes happen to the contents of the this cursors data set, for example, when the data set is changed via requery(), deactivate(), or close().
methods.boolean requery(): This method was deprecated in API level 15. Don't use this. Just request a new cursor, so you can do this asynchronously and update your list view once the new cursor comes back.
methods.Bundle respond(Bundle extras): This is an out-of-band way for the user of a cursor to communicate with the cursor.
methods.void setExtras(Bundle extras): Sets a Bundle that will be returned by getExtras().
methods.void setNotificationUri(ContentResolver: Register to watch a content URI for changes.
methods.void setNotificationUris(ContentResolver: Similar to setNotificationUri(android.content.ContentResolver, android.net.Uri), except this version allows to watch multiple content URIs for changes.
methods.void unregisterContentObserver(ContentOb: Unregister an observer that has previously been registered with this cursor via registerContentObserver(ContentObserver).
methods.void unregisterDataSetObserver(DataSetOb: Unregister an observer that has previously been registered with this cursor via registerContentObserver(ContentObserver).
